word: H762 - אֲרָמִית - ʼĂrâmîyth - ar-aw-meeth' - In the Syrian language

sections.paragraph:
Original: ארמית

Transliteration: 'ărâmı̂yth

Phonetic: ar-aw-meeth'

BDB Definition:

Aramaic = "language"
  1. the language of Aram, Aramaic

Origin: feminine of H761

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
